---
id: handle-list-api-keys
title: "List API keys"
description: "Returns all active API keys for the authenticated user. The raw token is never returned here — only the hint (last 4 chars). Includes `org_ids` showing which organizations each key is scoped to."
sidebar_label: "List API keys"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List API keys"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/settings/api-keys"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all active API keys for the authenticated user. The raw token is never returned here — only the hint (last 4 chars). Includes `org_ids` showing which organizations each key is scoped to.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./handle-list-api-keys.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  {...require("./handle-list-api-keys.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
